ham.subject: Your Acme SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

We hope you are enjoying your experience with Acme SaaS. This is a friendly reminder that your current subscription will expire on August 31, 2026. To continue uninterrupted service, please renew your subscription by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing Acme SaaS.

Best regards,
Acme Support Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Income Tax Refund Pending
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Smith,

The Income Tax Department has identified a pending refund of INR 12,345,678 for the 2025 tax year. To receive this refund, you must verify your bank account details and identity. Please complete the verification process within 48 hours by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to verify will result in the refund being withheld indefinitely. This matter requires your immediate attention.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
Tax Officer: R. Kumar
